title: cacalia candollei
intro: Cacalia candollei, also known as the Chinese artichoke or artichoke thistle, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Cacalia candollei include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to lower blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Cacalia candollei can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
